title: Enforcement of claims against estate
doc_html:
Art. 3396.16.  Enforcement of claims against estate

Any person having a claim against the estate may enforce the payment or performance of the claim against an independent administrator in the same manner and to the same extent provided for the assertion of such rights in this Code.

Acts 2001, No. 974, §1.
